briefdescription.para: This function Clears Uart terminal screen.
This function is called when the GT reset is done and it starts SDI Tx Subsystem.
This function is called when the RX Lock occurs, it calculates the frequency wrt RxTransMode, programs SI570 with the calculated frequency and then enables Rx stream flow IPs.
This function is called when the RX loses lock, and it stops SDI Tx Subsystem.
This function is called when assertion hits in the file.
This function is called to start the TX stream after the RX stream was up and running.
This function setups the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the SDI cores.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The SDI cores could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.
This function assumes a Microblaze or ARM system and no operating system is used. This function setup SI570 clock generator over IIC.

briefdescription.para: Set the output frequency of the Si570 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si570 device.
contains the value to be written in Si570 register for that particular clock frequency.

simplesect.para: SI570_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated
SI570_ERR_PARM when the ClkSrc or ClkDest parameters are invalid or the ClkInFreq or ClkOutFreq are out of range.

briefdescription.para: This function outputs the video information on TX and RX.
This function outputs the debug information.
Main function to call example with SDI TX and SDI RX drivers.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if SDI example was successfully.

briefdescription.para: This file demonstrates how to use Xilinx SDI Rx Subsystem for standalone.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 ssh 07/05/18 Initial release.
